description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the Pokémon character Bulbasaur, featuring a rounded, teal-blue body with a textured, slightly shiny surface. Its large, round eyes are set wide apart above a small, subtle mouth, giving it a cute and slightly surprised expression. The toy has darker blue-green spots on its body and legs, and a prominent, segmented green bulb on its back, which is characteristic of Bulbasaur. The surface appears soft and slightly bumpy, with visible stitching along the seams and the bulb. The toy stands on four short legs, each with rounded feet, and its head is large in proportion to its body. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the exterior.
description: A teal-blue plush toy resembling Bulbasaur with a green bulb on its back, large round eyes, and a soft, textured surface. The toy features dark blue spots and stands on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large, round eyes, subtle mouth, and the main body with blue spots.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the prominent green bulb on the back and the rounded head and body shape.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the segmented green bulb and the back of the toy, with visible stitching.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the bulb from another angle and the distribution of blue spots on the body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and slightly surprised, with wide, round eyes and a small, straight mouth. There are no visible eyebrows or exaggerated features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head held upright and the body balanced, giving a stable and alert posture.
